title: Understanding Free Fall
text: When an object is in free fall, it experiences no support force. This means that the only force acting on it is gravity.

title: Weightlessness in Free Fall
text: In free fall, objects appear weightless because they are accelerating at the same rate as gravity. This means the spring scale would read zero.

title: Calculating the Scale Reading
text: If the elevator is in free fall, what is the net force acting on the backpack?

title: Understanding the Scale Reading
text: Since the net force is zero, what does the spring scale read?
